name: Granite State Auto Service
description: Independent auto-repair shop in central New Hampshire. Two bays, two ASE-certified technicians plus the owner. General mechanical work, state inspections, brake and tire service. NAPA-affiliated parts buying. Filing as an S-corp.
notes: Designed to exercise parts-inventory vs. parts-COGS, shop-supplies vs. office-supplies, and capitalized-tool vs. expensed-tool decisions.
